### Checklist / 自查清单
- [ ] Code formatted / 代码已格式化
- [ ] No debug code left / 无调试代码残留
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies introduced; if new dependencies are added, dependency management files (e.g., package.json, requirements.txt) have been updated accordingly / 未引入冗余依赖；若新增依赖，则已同步更新依赖管理文件
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (if applicable) / 已同步更新相关文档（若适用）
